email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor WordPress Developer. In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto bouw en onderhoud ik WordPress-websites met Elementor en Astra, optimaliseer ik ze voor snelheid, SEO en veiligheid, en los ik technische problemen op. Ik heb ervaring met HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP, en het implementeren van gestructureerde data (JSON-LD). Daarnaast beheer ik migraties en updates.

Op mijn eigen project mirook.com heb ik een volledige WordPress-site ontworpen, inclusief custom thema-aanpassingen, SEO-optimalisatie en cross-browser compatibiliteit. Ik werk graag samen met designers en marketeers om concepten om te zetten in responsieve, functionele websites.

Ik spreek Engels en Turks vloeiend, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen). Ik ben flexibel, leergierig en woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the WordPress Developer position. In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I build and maintain WordPress websites with Elementor and Astra, optimize them for speed, SEO, and security, and troubleshoot technical issues. I have experience with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP, and implementing structured data (JSON-LD). I also handle migrations and updates.

On my own project mirook.com, I designed a full WordPress site, including custom theme adjustments, SEO optimization, and cross-browser compatibility. I enjoy collaborating with designers and marketers to turn concepts into responsive, functional websites.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons). I am flexible, eager to learn, and based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

I attach my CV and cover letter. I hope to speak with you soon.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van WordPress Developer. Uw oproep voor een creatieve en vaardige ontwikkelaar sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en passie voor het bouwen van hoogwaardige WordPress-websites.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige traject van WordPress-sitebouw en -onderhoud. Ik gebruik Elementor en Astra om responsieve, gebruiksvriendelijke websites te creëren die voldoen aan de doelen van de klant. Ik optimaliseer sites voor snelheid, SEO en veiligheid, los bugs op en voer updates en migraties uit. Mijn technische basis in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript en PHP stelt me in staat om zowel thema's als plugins aan te passen. Daarnaast werk ik samen met designers en marketeers om ontwerpen om te zetten in functionele websites.

Op mijn eigen project mirook.com heb ik een multi-page WordPress-site ontworpen en gebouwd, inclusief gestructureerde data (JSON-LD), entity-optimalisatie en technische SEO/GEO-audits. Deze ervaring heeft me geleerd om up-to-date te blijven met best practices en nieuwe trends in webontwikkeling.

Ik ben gewend aan cross-browser en cross-device testen en hecht veel waarde aan een naadloze gebruikerservaring. Mijn analytische vaardigheden en oog voor detail helpen me bij het troubleshooten en optimaliseren van websites.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren). Ik ben flexibel, leergierig en werk graag in een team. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben beschikbaar voor remote of hybride werk.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn bijdrage te leveren aan uw team. Ik voeg mijn CV bij en hoop u snel te spreken.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the WordPress Developer position. Your call for a creative and skilled developer aligns perfectly with my experience and passion for building high-quality WordPress websites.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for the full cycle of WordPress site building and maintenance. I use Elementor and Astra to create responsive, user-friendly websites that meet client goals. I optimize sites for speed, SEO, and security, fix bugs, and perform updates and migrations. My technical foundation in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and PHP allows me to customize both themes and plugins. I also collaborate with designers and marketers to turn concepts into functional websites.

On my own project mirook.com, I designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, including structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits. This experience has taught me to stay current with best practices and new trends in web development.

I am accustomed to cross-browser and cross-device testing and value a seamless user experience. My analytical skills and attention to detail help me troubleshoot and optimize websites.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons to improve). I am flexible, eager to learn, and enjoy working in a team. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am available for remote or hybrid work.

I look forward to contributing to your team. I attach my CV and hope to speak with you soon.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
2+ years of WordPress development experience (Episto + personal project)
Proficient in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP, and page builders (Elementor, Astra)
Experienced in custom theme/plugin development, site optimization, SEO, and security
Hands-on with structured data (JSON-LD), cross-browser compatibility, and site migrations
Strong problem-solving, collaboration, and communication skills; B1 Dutch, fluent English
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- WordPress: site building, theme customization, plugin management, Elementor, Astra theme
- Web development: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP, responsive web design
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
